authoritativeInputs: signed ChannelContextEvidence or unexpired EmbeddedEntryToken or validated SSO handoff
allowedActions: read summary; mutate when RouteIntentBinding and PatientEmbeddedNavEligibility are live; route-scoped bridge actions
forbiddenActions: raw URL mutation; raw outbound navigation; ungranted file delivery

authoritativeInputs: SSOEntryGrant and AuthBridgeTransaction validated but local session merge pending
allowedActions: auth progress; redacted callback handling; return disposition
forbiddenActions: PHI-bearing route detail before SessionMergeDecision; bridge-backed mutation

authoritativeInputs: user-agent marker or query hint or raw bridge object without server evidence
allowedActions: header/footer styling; recovery copy; no-PHI landing
forbiddenActions: trusted_embedded posture; mutation; file delivery; outbound handoff; PHI route detail

authoritativeInputs: no recognised evidence or conflicting evidence
allowedActions: ordinary browser shell after normal auth; bounded recovery
forbiddenActions: embedded-only bridge actions; NHS App app-page intents
